reviews.review_title: Developer called my son the n word
reviews.review_description: I am extremely concerned. My child interacted with the developer of this game, and during that interaction, the developer called my son both the N-word and the F-slur. This behavior is completely unacceptable, and it shows that this game is absolutely not safe or appropriate for children.
